arts.ttl: Preview: Mainz 05 vs. RB Leipzig - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Mainz 05 and RB Leipzig, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face HUGE competition in Benjamin Sesko chase
arts.sum: Manchester United will rival Arsenal in the race to sign RB Leipzig forward Benjamin Sesko next summer. “We need to work a little bit on his first touch because if you want to be at the top, top, top, top and achieve the next level in every competition, the first touch, in my opinion, is really important,” the RB Leipzig managing director for sport admitted.
